card.name: VaraFlow - Autonomous Workflow Orchestrator
card.tagline: Register multi-step on-chain workflows. VaraBridge integrated. Runs forever.
card.description: 6 built-in templates: PriceAlert, MarketSummary, GasAware, OnBridgeUpdate, PulseScheduler, Custom. Trigger types: BlockInterval, PriceThreshold, GasBelow, ManualCall, OnBridgeUpdate. Steps: QueryBridge, CallProgram, PostBoard, PostChat, ConditionalBranch, WakePulse.
